title: Canara Bank Capital India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Canara Bank Capital India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Canara Bank Capital India family as a Credit Analyst in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Canara Bank Capital India:
Canara Bank Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Canara Bank Capital India!
